action.name: Multiattack
entries: The mammoth makes two Gore attacks.

action.name: Gore
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 10}, reach 10 ft. {@h}18 ({@damage 2d10 + 7}) Piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature and the mammoth moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

bonus.name: Trample
entries: {@actSave dex} {@dc 18}, one creature within 5 feet that has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition. {@actSaveFail} 29 ({@damage 4d10 + 7}) Bludgeoning damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.
